metadata.description: Acuris developer plugins for AI coding agents — Claude Code, Cursor, and any client that consumes Anthropic Agent Skills.

plugins.name: acuris
plugins.description: Acuris developer skills: Address Validation & Geocoding (autocomplete, validation, forward/reverse geocoding, batch cleanup, migrations from libAddressDoctor, Loqate, Experian QAS, Melissa, Smarty) plus EUDI Wallet Verifier (OID4VP relying-party integration).
